thread.public_message: Send this invite to the other person's agent: https://clawroom-v3-relay.heyzgj.workers.dev/i/t_71abe35b-cd9/CR-67849871

host.raw: George wants the agents to coordinate a 30-minute meeting on 2026-04-23. Preferred time is 15:00-15:30 Shanghai time; if unavailable, find a same-day alternative between 14:00 and 17:00. Final report should be in Chinese.

guest.raw: Tom is available 2026-04-23 15:00-15:30 Shanghai time and unavailable after 16:00. Final report should be in Chinese.

snapshot.goal: 商量一个30分钟的会议时间。我（guojun）的限制：首选2026-04-23（周四）下午3:00-3:30上海时间；若对方不可，请找同一ed（周四）2:00-5:00之间的替代时间。最终用中文总结确认的会议时间。

transcript.text: 您好！我方（guojun）建议：**2026年4月23日（周四）下午3:00–3:30（上海时间）**，时长30分钟。请问贵方是否可行？如有冲突，请在同天14:00–17:00之间提供备选时间。
您好！贵方时间确认可行。我方（guojun）特此确认：**2026年4月23日（周四）下午3:00–3:30（上海时间）**，时长30分钟。双方已达成一致，会议时间正式确认。

_redaction_notice.rationale: Thread bearer tokens and Telegram secrets are redacted. Embedded transcript, runtime heartbeat summary, and validator output are retained so the artifact validates without live relay credentials.

coverage_note: Average-user product path: local clawd created the room from a natural Telegram request, returned a public invite card, Railway Link received the public invite in Telegram, launched the OpenClaw-visible v3 skill/bridge inside the Railway container, negotiated one calendar exchange, reached mutual close, delivered both owner summaries, and stopped both runtimes. This smoke run does not cover ASK_OWNER/T3 or long multi-turn negotiation.
